message.content:
Implement the following plan: # Plan: Add Bot Banner to "Join a Discord Server" Task ## Context Currently, the 🤖 "Add the ClawQuest bot to your server" banner only appears in the `DiscordRoleFields` component (used by `verify_role` tasks). The `join_server` (discord_join) task type shows no such prompt, even though the bot must be present to verify that humans actually joined the server. The goal: show the same bot banner for the `discord_join` fields section too. ## Critical File `apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/quests/create.tsx` - `discord_join` block: lines 620–635 - `DiscordRoleFields` bot banner: lines 450–463 - `handleInviteBot` logic in `DiscordRoleFields`: lines 423–431 ## Approach Add a **static bot banner** before the `discord_join` ChipInput (lines 620–635). It will: - Always show "Add the **ClawQuest bot** to your server to enable join verification." - Include an "Invite Bot" button that calls `GET /discord/bot-invite-url?guildId=` (empty guildId, same pattern as `DiscordRoleFields`) No dynamic state or API detection needed — the `join_server` task doesn't need role fetching. The banner is informational only. ## Change Replace the `discord_join` block (lines 620–635) with: ```tsx {(fields === "discord_join") && ( <>
🤖 Add the ClawQuest bot to your server to enable join verification.
Invite link to the Discord server. Press ↵ to confirm.
addChip(idx, val)} onRemove={ci => removeChip(idx, ci)} placeholder="https://discord.gg/..." validate={v => DISCORD_INVITE_RE.test(v.trim()) ? null : "Must be a valid Discord invite link (discord.gg/… or discord.com/invite/…)"} maxChips={1} error={chipError} chipStatus={chipStatus} />
)} ``` ## Verification - Open Create Quest → add a Discord task → select "Join a Discord Server" - Confirm the 🤖 bot banner appears above the invite URL input - Click "Invite Bot" → confirm it opens the bot invite URL in a new tab - Switch to "Verify Role in Discord" → confirm its existing banner still works If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /Users/vuongluu/.claude/projects/-Users-vuongluu-Documents-jobs-lab3-ceo-clawquest/6575526e-c206-48e8-b6e0-70c3cddc6879.jsonl

content.text:
Done. The bot banner is now added to the `discord_join` block. It:
- Shows the 🤖 indigo banner with "Add the **ClawQuest bot** to your server to enable join verification."
- Has an "Invite Bot" button that fetches `GET /discord/bot-invite-url?guildId=` and opens the URL in a new tab
- Wraps both banner and the existing ChipInput in a `<>` fragment

The existing `discord_role` banner in `DiscordRoleFields` is untouched.
